badges.title: Overwhelming Speed
badges.desc: MVP delivery in 1 hour to 1 business day

concept.title: What is our "AI Native Solution"?
concept.lead: It's not simply about "adopting AI tools." It's about fusing AI capabilities into your core operations, products, and services to simultaneously achieve
concept.leadAfter: — efficiency, quality improvement, cost reduction, and time savings. We call this the social implementation of AI, maximizing your competitive edge.

competence.title: 3 Reasons We Achieve Both Speed and Quality

cards.heading: Accurately extracting true needs before solution design.
cards.body: No matter how advanced the AI, it's meaningless if applied to the wrong problem. Our professional consultants thoroughly analyze your existing operations, visualizing workflows and system integrations. By precisely defining the real bottlenecks, we build a solid foundation for high-quality, focused solutions.

cards.heading: Delivering a working MVP in as little as 1 hour.
cards.body: We implement refined requirements at extreme speed using our proprietary AI-powered development methods. Not theory — we prepare actual working prototypes (MVPs) in 1 hour to 1 business day. By aligning requirements with real products, we eliminate rework and reduce development timelines to 1/3 or less.

cards.eyebrow: Reason 3: AI + Human Hybrid Testing Framework
cards.heading: Speed-focused, but never compromising on quality.
cards.body: Our proprietary development methodology includes rigorous testing processes to ensure quality. Beyond comprehensive AI-driven automated testing, we combine human checks by consultants and engineers to guarantee safe, high-quality solutions that withstand the demands of real-world operations.

cards.title: AI Integration into Business Workflows
cards.label: AI Native Workflow
cards.body: We embed AI agents into existing flows — from simple repetitive tasks to complex business processing, back-office operations, and customer support. We visualize and accumulate your non-personnel assets, enabling autonomous business logic processing for massive labor cost reduction and elimination of human error.

cards.title: AI Fusion into Core Products
cards.label: AI Native Application
cards.body: We integrate cutting-edge AI capabilities into your services and new business applications. By delegating complex backend processing to AI, you can launch products with unique competitive advantages at incredible speed while keeping development costs low.

cards.title: AI-Powered Development
cards.label: AI Native Development
cards.body: Even for ground-up development, our proprietary AI-driven methodology shines. We optimize every stage from concept and requirements through implementation and testing with AI, achieving delivery at unprecedented low cost and short timelines.

cards.title: Business Logic First
cards.desc: We work backwards from your business success, not from technology.

cards.title: No Blackbox
cards.desc: We make AI processing logic transparent, delivering solutions you own and control with confidence.

cards.title: Speed is Value
cards.desc: In an era of uncertainty, getting a working product in your hands as fast as possible is our top priority.

values.sectionSubtitle: Four fundamental principles that guide how we work.

items.title: Cutting-edge technology, production-ready
items.description: We deliver the latest AI and blockchain technologies in production-ready forms. Not technology for technology's sake — we pursue solutions that drive real outcomes.

items.title: Transparency and Trust
items.description: We openly share development processes, decision rationales, and execution logs. Client confidence and operational safety are our top priorities.

items.title: End-to-End Value Delivery
items.description: Consistent support from concept through design, implementation, and operations. We deliver a seamless development experience with no gaps.

items.title: Uncompromising Safety
items.description: Blockchain deployments are immutable. That's why we never compromise on security reviews, audits, and risk management.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description:
Maximize business potential through the power of AI and Web3.0.
We transform cutting-edge technology into practical solutions, accelerating our clients' growth. From business analysis to implementation and operations, we deliver results with consistent, end-to-end support.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description:
A world where everyone can harness advanced technology.
We remove technical complexity and create a future where AI agents and blockchain become everyday tools for everyone.

whyUs.sectionSubtitle: Five proven strengths that set Nebula Infinity apart.

points.title: Business Analysis & Requirements Definition
points.description: Our experienced consultants carefully analyze your workflows. We accurately understand real-world challenges and extract only the necessary features — avoiding over-engineering and proposing optimal solutions.

points.title: Process Analysis & Workflow Design
points.description: We thoroughly analyze business processes and extract complete business logic. Drawing on extensive experience, we design automation workflows that work at production scale — not just in theory, but in real operations.

points.title: One-Stop Service
points.description: We support everything from initial concept through implementation to operations. Full-stack coverage: frontend, backend, infrastructure, and smart contract development. No fragmented contacts or information gaps.

points.title: Cutting-Edge Technology
points.description: We continuously stay current with the latest AI and blockchain technologies. Supporting the newest LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic Claude) and major chains (Ethereum, Polygon), we deliver optimal solutions tailored to you.

points.title: Proprietary High-Efficiency Development Methods
points.description: Using AI-powered development environments and our proprietary methodologies and process controls, we achieve exceptionally fast development. We can implement MVPs in as little as 1 hour, accelerating hypothesis-validation cycles.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Please check here before contacting us.

items.question: How long does development take?
items.answer: It depends on project scale and requirements, but MVPs can be delivered in as little as 1 hour, while full-scale application development typically takes 2 weeks to 3 months. We'll provide a detailed schedule after the initial consultation.

items.question: What is your pricing structure?
items.answer: We provide custom quotes based on project content, scale, and duration. Initial consultations are free, so please feel free to contact us.

items.question: Can you handle small projects?
items.answer: Yes, we can. We actively support small projects including MVP development and proof-of-concept (PoC) initiatives.

items.question: Do you provide operational support?
items.answer: Yes, we provide post-development operational support. We offer continuous support including maintenance, operations, feature additions, and troubleshooting.

items.question: Can we hold meetings online?
items.answer: Yes, we support online meeting tools like Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams. Remote clients are welcome.

items.question: What about security measures?
items.answer: We implement comprehensive security measures including smart contract security audits, code reviews, and gas optimization. Blockchain projects undergo especially rigorous review.
